name: Guacamole Con Cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the ripe avocados.
2. Add lemon juice and blend until smooth.
3. Peel, chop, and drain the tomatoes. Add to the avocado mixture.
4. Include remaining ingredients (onions, seasoned salt, lemon pepper, black olives, green chili peppers, and fresh cilantro) and blend until smooth.
5. Cover and chill.
6. Serve over chicken enchiladas or as a sauce with any Mexican-style dishes such as chicken, beef, or cheese.
7. Also serve with tortilla chips for dipping.
8. This guacamole can be kept in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours if stored tightly covered.
